title: Chain Config
description: FR-VID-12 §4 Stage 7 — Structured ordered handoff definition. Chains execute steps sequentially with each step receiving the output of the previous step. Agents exchange structured packets, not implicit conversational state.

description.description: Human-readable description of the chain's purpose.

execution_shape.description: Execution shape — chain means ordered sequential handoff.

step_index.description: Zero-based index in the execution sequence.

agent_id.description: Reference to a DEP-RUN-002 agent contract ID for this step.

task.description: Description of the task this step performs.

receives_from_previous.description: Whether this step receives the output packet of the previous step.

ordered_steps.description: Ordered sequence of agent steps in this chain.

stop_on_failure.description: Whether the chain aborts if any step fails.

packet_types.description: Structured packet types exchanged between steps in this chain.
